Article Title: IPL 2026: Tilak Varma scripts history, becomes joint-fastest ever to hit…
Article Text:
Mumbai Indians' Tilak Varma (PTI Photo/Salman Ali)

Watch IPL 2026: ‘It’s the nature of the game’ - Varun Chakaravarthy on pitch, pressure & KKR win IPL 2026: ‘It’s the nature of the game’ - Varun Chakaravarthy on pitch, pressure & KKR win

Tilak Varma’s innings progression (by 10-ball groups)

Fastest hundreds for MI in IPL (by balls)

Poll Should Tilak Varma be promoted to bat higher in the order? Yes, absolutely! No, he should stay at No.5

Tilak Varma’s breakthrough moment in the IPL 2026 did not just arrive, it exploded into life.Coming in under pressure at No.5, with Mumbai Indians reeling early, Tilak produced one of the most astonishing counterattacks the league has seen. Against Gujarat Titans, he turned a shaky innings into a statement night, finishing unbeaten on 101 off just 45 balls.The start was anything but promising. Kagiso Rabada ripped through the top order in the powerplay, leaving MI struggling. Tilak himself began cautiously. After 20 balls, he had crawled to just 17 runs, searching for timing and rhythm.Then everything changed.What followed was pure destruction. Tilak hammered 82 runs off his last 23 deliveries, shifting gears with breathtaking ease. His innings progression tells the story of a player who recalibrated mid-innings and then dominated:1-10: 10 runs11-20: 7 runs21-30: 30 runs31-40: 33 runs41-45: 21 runsFrom calculated rebuild to outright carnage, he dismantled the GT attack with seven sixes and eight fours. The final flourish summed it up perfectly, a boundary off the last ball to bring up his maiden IPL century.The hundred was not just memorable, it was historic. Tilak now holds the joint-fastest century for Mumbai Indians in IPL history, equalling Sanath Jayasuriya’s 45-ball effort from 2008. He now sits atop an elite list for the franchise:45 - Sanath Jayasuriya vs CSK, Wankhede, 200845 - Tilak Varma vs GT, Ahmedabad, 202647 - Cameron Green vs SRH, Wankhede, 202349 - Suryakumar Yadav vs GT, Wankhede, 2023This knock also places Tilak in rare company. Only a handful of players have scored IPL hundreds batting at No.5 or lower, including Yusuf Pathan, David Miller and Ben Stokes. Now, Tilak Varma’s name sits alongside them.The context makes it even more compelling. Before this match, Tilak had endured a lean run, scoring just 43 runs in five innings. Questions were beginning to surface. This was his answer.From struggling for form to producing one of the finest rescue acts of IPL 2026, Tilak Varma didn’t just return. He announced himself again, louder than ever.
Article Summary: Tilak varma scored 101 off just 45 balls against gujarat titans. It is the joint-fastest century for mumbai indians in ipl history, equalling sanath jayasuriya’s 45-ball effort from 2008. Only a handful of players have scored ipl hundreds batting at no.5 or lower.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumor: New York Giants eye big defensive move for former Detroit Lions $25M star after losing Dexter Lawrence
Article Text:
New York Giants eye big defensive move for former Detroit Lions $25M star after losing Dexter Lawrence.(Image via X)

New York Giants eye former Detroit Lions ’ star player, D.J. Reader , after a brutal season on the field amid losing Dexter Lawrence



The New York Giants have had a disastrous run on the field in the last two seasons with just 4 wins and 13 losses in the 2025 season.As many remain concerned about the team, it seems the New York Giants are focused on fixing the team’s roster, especially after losing their star player, Dexter Lawrence.A few hours ago, Doug Rush of FanSided’s recent post on X read as, “The Giants are reportedly expected to sign veteran DT D.J. Reader after the draft, as it will protect the comp pick formula, per @NYPost_Schwartz…”Doug Rush of FanSided added, “The Giants initially wanted to sign Reader and pair him with Dexter Lawrence, but Lawrence is now on the Bengals following the weekend’s trade.”The post continued, “Reader made a visit with the Giants last week, and is now expected to sign with the team once the draft is concluded.”However, the New York Giants have stayed away from confirming the speculations as the defensive lineman, D.J. Reader, has also remained silent about the trade rumor.The former Detroit Lions’ star player, D.J. Reader, has slightly dipped in performance since the 2024 season.Last season, D.J. Reader was relatively healthy and did not sustain any injuries but he failed to perform well on the field even though he had broken records in 2024.The former Detroit Lions’ defensive lineman recorded 28 total tackles and 4 quarterback hits in 17 games.Back in 2024, as he recovered from a brutal quadriceps injury, D.J. Reader started 15 games as he finished the season with roughly 23-28 tackles, 4 tackles for loss, and 8 quarterback hits.While D.J. Reader’s performance has slightly dipped since 2024, many remain concerned about whether he would be an impactful addition to the New York Giants.With his $27.25 million contract with the Detroit Lions ending, all eyes are on where D.J. Reader ends up next as many are expecting him to bounce back on the field after an average run on the field in the last season.
Article Summary: New york giants eye big defensive move for former detroit lions $25m star after losing dexter lawrence. New york giants have had a disastrous run on the field in the last two seasons with just 4 wins and 13 losses in the 2025 season.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Sanjiv Goenka rushes to Arya, Preity Zinta engages with Pant after PBKS hammer LSG
Article Text:
Sanjiv Goenka with Priyansh Arya, Preity Zinta with Rishabh Pant

Watch IPL 2026: LSG’s Prince Yadav backs their plan despite loss to PBKS IPL 2026: LSG’s Prince Yadav backs their plan despite loss to PBKS

Sanjiv Goenka of Lucknow Super Giants and Preity Zinta of Punjab Kings remain two of the most visible franchise owners in the IPL, regularly spotted following their teams closely from the stands. Their latest appearance came during the clash at the PCA Stadium in Mullanpur on Sunday night, where PBKS dominated LSG and the post-match scenes saw both owners briefly step into interactions with players.Goenka, who is often seen actively engaging with his team management and captains over the years, including earlier discussions with KL Rahul and more recently Rishabh Pant, was once again in the spotlight after LSG’s defeat. Following their 54-run loss, he was seen speaking to Punjab Kings’ in-form batter Priyansh Arya, who had torn into the bowling attack with a stunning 93 off just 37 balls.At the same time, LSG skipper Rishabh Pant was involved in a separate conversation with PBKS co-owner Preity Zinta. He was present in a small group that also included Yuzvendra Chahal and Shashank Singh , as they exchanged words with Zinta in a casual post-match setting.On the field, Punjab Kings delivered a commanding performance to extend their strong start to the season.They registered their fifth win in six matches, climbing back to the top of the table. Priyansh Arya’s explosive innings set the tone, Cooper Connolly added valuable support, and late contributions from Shashank Singh and Marcus Stoinis pushed PBKS to a massive total of 254.LSG, in contrast, had no answers to the target. Struggling for rhythm and consistency this season, they slipped to a third consecutive defeat. The heavy 54-run loss highlighted their ongoing issues, with the side now needing a quick turnaround to stop the slide and rebuild momentum.
Article Summary: Sanjiv goenka and preity zinta are two of the most visible franchise owners in the ipl. Both owners briefly stepped into interactions with players after the match. Lsg skipper rishabh pant was involved in a separate conversation with pbks co-owner preityzinta.

Article Title: WWE RAW Results & Highlights 20-april-2026: Jacob Fatu confronts Roman Reigns, NXT stars make their debut, and more
Article Text:
Image via WWE

What happened in the opening segment of WWE RAW (April 20)?



Rhea Ripley and IYO Sky vs. The Kabuki Warriors



Ethan Page vs. Je'Von Evans

Liv Morgan vs. Sol Ruca

Finn Balor vs. JD McDonagh

Roman Reigns' appearance

WWE presented the April 20 episode from the T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas, Nevada. This was the fallout edition of the show for the two-night WrestleMania 42 extravaganza, signaling the start of a new season in WWE. It saw the arrival of NXT stars on the main roster, some exciting matches, and the huge confrontation between cousins, Jacob Fatu and the new World Heavyweight Champion, Roman Reigns.Oba Femi opened the show wearing a suit and strutting his way to the ring. He showed confidence one night after beating and seemingly retiring Brock Lesnar at WrestleMania 42. Femi said, "The Ruler has arrived," keeping it short before making his exit.The new WWE Women's Champion, Rhea Ripley, teamed up with her close ally, IYO Sky, to square off against Asuka and Kairi Sane. The exciting tag team showdown ended with Ripley delivering a Riptide on Sane and Sky hitting the moonsault to score the win for her team.Ethan Page was revealed to be the newest RAW superstar and squared off against Je'Von Evans. Both former NXT stars delivered a captivating bout. However, Rusev interfered but was taken out by a dive by Evans outside the ring.This cost him as Page blocked his double jump cutter and then hit a Twisted Grin to score the win. Rusev then began attacking Evans, which led to Penta arriving to make the save. However, he also fell prey to Rusev as Page decided to leave the scene.Sol Ruca made her official debut on RAW, interrupting Liv Morgan's title win address at WrestleMania 42. This led Adam Pearce to make a non-title match between them on the spot. Ruca delivered an exceptional performance against the new champion. However, her former partner, Zaria, appeared and shoved her into the ring post. As she entered the ring, Morgan hit the Oblivion to win the match. After that, Morgan was confronted by the former champion, Stephanie Vaquer, on the ramp.Finn Balor squared off against his former protege, JD McDonagh, in a huge singles bout. McDonagh managed to hold his own against Balor; however, he fell short as Balor hit the Coup de Grâce in the end to win. Following that, Dominik Mysterio attacked him, but Balor managed to overpower both stars.Roman Reigns came out with his cousins, The Usos, in the final segment of the show. Reigns said that he missed tagging with the duo, and both Jimmy and Jey acknowledged him as their Tribal Chief. Jacob Fatu then arrived to confront them. He said that he wanted everything Reigns had, including the World title, and would take it at WWE's next PLE, Backlash. However, Reigns said that he should think it over and would see him next week on RAW.Also read: CM Punk makes hilarious gesture after losing heavyweight title to Roman Reigns at WrestleMania 42
Article Summary: Wwe presented the april 20 episode from the t-mobile arena in las vegas, nevada. This was the fallout edition of the show for the two-night wrestlemania 42 extravaganza. It saw the arrival of nxt stars on the main roster, some exciting matches, and the huge confrontation between cousins, jacob fatu and roman reigns.

Article Title: IPL 2026: No Rohit Sharma! MI hand two debut caps as GT opt to field
Article Text:
Mumbai Indians' Rohit Sharma (PTI Photo)

Watch RCB admit batting failure after close defeat | IPL 2026 RCB admit batting failure after close defeat | IPL 2026

Teams:

Gujarat Titans

Mumbai Indians

Gujarat Titans captain Shubman Gill won the toss and opted to field against Mumbai Indians in their IPL 2026 clash, backing conditions that could favour chasing later in the evening.“It looks like a decent wicket, honestly. There was a bit of dew in the last match. So just in case there is today, I think it would make more sense. Always good to have a target on the board and then try to chase it down,” Gill said at the toss. He also highlighted his side’s strong new-ball bowling and the impact of Rashid Khan in the middle overs, adding that GT were unchanged for the contest.For Mumbai, the big talking point was the absence of Rohit Sharma , while captain Hardik Pandya confirmed two debutants in the XI — Krish Bhagat and Danish Malewar.“We would have fielded as well. We had to regroup and speak about what MI stands for. This time we want to make sure we play some good cricket. Just backing each other. Want to go out there and play good cricket. We need to play good cricket overall. Need to get better as a group. Danish makes his debut, Krish is also playing today,” Hardik said.Mumbai Indians come into the match under pressure, having lost four consecutive games after their opening win against Kolkata Knight Riders, leaving them at the bottom of the table.Gujarat Titans, meanwhile, have had a steadier campaign with three wins from five matches, placing them sixth and looking to build further momentum.(Playing XI): Shubman Gill(c), Sai Sudharsan, Jos Buttler(w), Washington Sundar, Glenn Phillips, Shahrukh Khan, Rashid Khan, Mohammed Siraj, Kagiso Rabada, Prasidh Krishna, Ashok Sharma(Playing XI): Danish Malewar, Quinton de Kock(w), Naman Dhir, Suryakumar Yadav, Hardik Pandya(c), Tilak Varma, Sherfane Rutherford, Mitchell Santner, Krish Bhagat, Jasprit Bumrah, AM Ghazanfar
Article Summary: Gujarat titans captain shubman gill won the toss and opted to field against mumbai indians in their ipl 2026 clash. Gill backed conditions that could favour chasing later in the evening. Mumbai indians come into the match under pressure, having lost four consecutive games after their opening win against kolkata knight riders.

Article Title: Stephen Curry breaks silence on 2028 Olympics as he spends time with Ayesha Curry hours after heartbreaking loss
Article Text:
Stephen Curry breaks silence on 2028 Olympics as he spends time with Ayesha Curry hours after heartbreaking loss.(Image via Getty Images)

Stephen Curry shares his opinion on potentially playing in the upcoming Olympics amid a brutal loss



Stephen Curry and Ayesha Curry opt to spend some quality time in public amid the season ending loss



Stephen Curry, the Golden State Warriors’ star player and the NBA legend, is now dealing with a brutal season ending loss against the Phoenix Suns.Amid this, the four time NBA champion has opened up about potentially gearing up for Team USA in the 2028 Summer Olympics.A few hours ago, in an interview with California Post, the Golden State Warriors’ opened up about the possibility of playing in the 2028 Summer Olympics as he said, “We’ll figure it out when the time comes, for sure…”.This has sparked concern among fans since many have been expecting Stephen Curry to gear up for the 2028 Summer Olympics after his successful win at the 2024 Paris Summer Olympics.However, it seems all that Stephen Curry wants to focus on is spending some quality time with his wife, Ayesha Curry, and their four young children.Recently, Stephen Curry and his wife, popular entrepreneur and chef Ayesha Curry, turned heads as the two attended the second weekend of Coachella.Stephen Curry’s wife, Ayesha Curry, took to her social media to make several posts of the night as she seemed awe of pop star, Justin Bieber, as he headlined the festival.Though both Stephen Curry and his wife, Ayesha Curry, prefer to stay out of the spotlight, it seems the two wanted to enjoy a fun night without their children.While the four time NBA champion, Stephen Curry, looked relaxed and excited as he enjoyed the night out with his wife, the season ending loss has sparked speculations of his potential retirement.Just hours after the Golden State Warriors lost the game to the Phoenix Suns, Stephen Curry was asked by the media if he had been planning to retire.The NBA legend slammed all retirement rumors as he made it clear that he is here for the next few years.Stephen Curry spoke about the number of years he has left in the league and said, “Multiple for sure. None of those conversations [on an extension] have happened, so it’ll be a busy summer for the Warriors…”
Article Summary: Stephen curry breaks silence on 2028 olympics as he spends time with ayesha curry hours after heartbreaking loss. Curry spoke about the number of years he has left in the league and said, “multiple for sure. None of those conversations [on an extension] have happened, so it'll be a busy summer for the warriors…”

Article Title: Taylor Swift Wedding: Blake Lively’s cryptic dig at Travis Kelce weeks before he marries Taylor Swift sparks concern amid their strained bond
Article Text:
Blake Lively’s apparent dig at Travis Kelce weeks before Taylor Swift’s big day sparks concern amid their strained bond.(Image via Getty Images)

Blake Lively makes a shocking move against Travis Kelce as Taylor Swift gears up to marry him



Is Blake Lively attending Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding?



Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are just days away from their high profile wedding as they focus on keeping things private and out of the spotlight.While the billionaire pop star has mostly tried to keep herself away from drama, her former best friend, Blake Lively , might have hinted at her feelings about Taylor Swift marrying Travis Kelce.The “It Ends With Us” star actress, Blake Lively, has seemingly removed the Kansas City Chiefs’ player and Taylor Swift’s future husband, Travis Kelce, from her social media.This seems like a shocking move, considering how supportive Blake Lively was of Travis Kelce when she and Taylor Swift were friends.For the unversed, in 2023 and 2024, Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds often accompanied Taylor Swift to cheer on Travis Kelce.The popular actress was even present at 2024 Super Bowl as the Kansas City Chiefs lifted the cup.The four were also frequently spotted on double date nights in and around New York City.To make things worse, a few weeks ago, as per Rob Shuter, a source close to Travis Kelce revealed that he was not particularly fond of Ryan Reynolds and felt “it was all optics” when the four would step out together.Last year, Travis Kelce also removed Ryan Reynolds from his social media even as the “Deadpool” star continues to follow him.Though Travis Kelce has not addressed this rumored rift in public, he has also removed Blake Lively from his social media as he stands by his future wife, Taylor Swift.While Blake Lively continues to follow the billionaire pop star, Taylor Swift, on her social media, the popular actress has maintained her distance from reacting to any of Swift’s achievements, including when she posted about reclaiming rights to all her music or when she posted about her engagement to Travis Kelce.A few months ago, when Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce announced their engagement, as per Daily Mail, a source revealed, “Blake didn’t reach out [following the engagement announcement] and isn’t going to…”The source added, “This isn’t the time. What would be the point of reaching out now? It really makes no sense. [Lively] has bigger fish to fry…”Though it seems Taylor Swift’s bond with Blake Lively has come to an end, all eyes are on whether the actress attends her wedding to Travis Kelce.
Article Summary: Blake lively’s apparent dig at travis kelce sparks concern amid their strained bond. Blake lively continues to follow the billionaire pop star, taylor swift, on her social media. The popular actress has maintained her distance from reacting to any of swift's achievements, including when she posted about reclaiming rights to all her music.

Article Title: Brazilian triathlete Mara Flavia Araujo’s final Instagram post resurfaces after Ironman Texas swim tragedy leaves fans heartbroken
Article Text:
Brazilian triathlete Mara Flavia Araujo’s final Instagram post resurfaces after Ironman Texas swim tragedy leaves fans heartbroken (Image via Getty)

Mara Flavia Araujo’s final Instagram post and what happened during Ironman Texas swim

“We are saddened to confirm the death of a participant in the race during the swimming portion of today’s Ironman Texas triathlon. We send our deepest condolences to the family and friends and offer our support at this difficult time.

Thanks to the emergency services for their quick intervention.”

“She was ill before the trip, she wasn’t okay. My wife and I spoke with her to say she was too weak for this race, although a couple of days ago when we talked to her, she insisted she was okay. I still cannot believe what’s happened.

Our thoughts are with her friends and family members. May she rest in peace.”

The sports world woke up to heartbreaking news after Brazilian triathlete Mara Flavia Araujo lost her life during a race in the United States. She went missing during the swimming leg of the Ironman Texas triathlon on April 19, 2026. The event took place at Lake Woodlands, where she disappeared in the water during the early hours of the race. What makes this even more emotional is what surfaced after. Just hours before the race, her last Instagram post started circulating online. In that post, she was seen sitting calmly near a swimming pool, dressed for training. At that moment, nothing looked unusual. But now, that same post feels very different to people who followed her journey.In her last Instagram update, Mara Flavia looked focused and ready. She wore her swim gear and sat by the pool, possibly preparing for the big race ahead. Her caption was simple, and like many athletes, she shared it as part of her daily routine. There was no sign of trouble.However, things changed quickly during the race. The Ironman event includes a 2.4-mile swim, followed by cycling and running. During the swimming section, Mara went missing.Rescue teams were alerted around 7:30 a.m. local time. After hours of search using sonar and dive teams, her body was found around 9:40 a.m.Event organizers later confirmed the news in an official statement shared with media, including Chosun.com. They said:More details came out through a report by Yahoo. According to her close friend Taveira, Mara had not been feeling well before traveling for the race. He shared:Mara was 38 years old and came from São Paulo, Brazil. She had around 60,000 followers on social media and was known for sharing her fitness journey. Her sudden death has left fans, friends, and the sports community in shock, with many now revisiting her final post and leaving messages of support for her family.
Article Summary: Brazilian triathlete mara flavia araujo’s final instagram post resurfaces after ironman texas swim tragedy leaves fans heartbroken. She went missing during the swimming leg of the ironmantexas triathlon on april 19, 2026. The event took place at lake woodlands, where she disappeared in the water.

Article Title: Ipl 2026 Schedule: IPL 2026 schedule this week (April 6 to April 12): Full list of matches, dates, timings, venues and results
Article Text:
RCB and MI players

IPL 2026 schedule

this week (6-12 April):

Full schedule of IPL 2026 this week (6-12 April): Matches, dates, timings, venues & results

Date Day Home Team Visiting Team Time (IST) Venue Result April 6 Monday KKR PBKS 7:30 PM Kolkata Washed out April 7 Tuesday RR MI 7:30 PM Guwahati RR win by 27 runs April 8 Wednesday DC GT 7:30 PM Delhi GT win by 1 run April 9 Thursday KKR LSG 7:30 PM Kolkata LSG win by 3 wickets April 10 Friday RR RCB 7:30 PM Guwahati RR win by 6 wickets April 11 Saturday PBKS SRH 3:30 PM New Chandigarh PBKS win by 6 wickets April 11 Saturday CSK DC 7:30 PM Chennai CSK win by 23 runs April 12 Sunday LSG GT 3:30 PM Lucknow GT win by 7 wickets April 12 Sunday MI RCB 7:30 PM Mumbai RCB win by 18 runs

After nine thrilling matches last week, a trend is beginning to emerge on which teams are on a roll and which are still struggling to settle into the new season. So far, 15 matches have been played in the new season of the IPL , and four teams have already set the early marker in the race for the playoffs.With four wins in four matches, Rajasthan Royals sit at the top of the points table. Punjab Kings are at second after two wins and a no result due to rain. They are followed by defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru, Delhi Capitals and Lucknow Super Giants, who have two wins each so far. Meanwhile, Chennai Super Kings and Kolkata Knight Riders are two winless teams in IPL 2026.With a win each, Sunrisers Hyderabad, Mumbai Indians, and Gujarat Titans have opened their account in the standings and will look to challenge the top four in coming fixtures.The ongoing IPL season has already witnessed multiple weather disruptions across the country. The KKR vs PBKS clash in Kolkata was washed out, while the RR vs MI encounter had to be curtailed to just 11 overs per side in which Rajasthan Royals outclassed Mumbai Indians by 27 runs. And on Wednesday, GT held their nerves to beat hosts DC by one run in a last-ball thriller.KKR lost their 3rd match in a row after Mukul Choudhary pulled off a record breaking chase for LSG in the last-ball thriller.Rajasthan Royals and Royal Challengers Bengaluru, face off in Guwahati on Friday.The weekend double-headers will see Punjab Kings take on Sunrisers Hyderabad and Chennai Super Kings face Delhi Capitals on Saturday, followed by Lucknow Super Giants vs Gujarat Titans and Mumbai Indians vs Royal Challengers Bengaluru on Sunday.There is likely to be plenty of shuffling in the points table this week.
Article Summary: Rajasthan royals and royal challengers bengaluru, face off in guwahati on friday. Chennai super kings and kolkata knight riders are two winless teams in ipl 2026. Sunrisers hyderabad, mumbai indians, and gujarat titans have opened their account in the standings.

Article Title: 2026 NFL Draft Rumors: Rome Odunze’s Chicago Bears asked to steer clear of UCF’s 20-sack edge
Article Text:
NFL Draft Trade Rumors 2026: Rome Odunze’s Chicago Bears asked to steer clear of UCF’s 20-sack edge (Image via Getty: Chicago Bears logo and San Francisco 49ers logo)

Bears must avoid drafting Knights pass rusher Malachi Lawrence

San Francisco 49ers are projected to select Malachi Lawrence

Like analysts can predict which draft is suitable for which NFL team, there’s a certain kind of prediction where analysts predict which draft will be deemed unsuitable for which NFL team. And that’s where the Chicago Bears come into the picture, and they have been asked to steer clear of UCF Knights edge Malachi Lawrence.Bleacher Report’s Alex Ballentine shared a list titled “1 Prospect Each Team Must Avoid in 2026 NFL Draft.” He chose Lawrence for Chicago. Why? When so many analysts have been predicting him for them, why now. With just days remaining for the draft... let’s find out.A to Z Sports’ Kole Noble predicts Malachi Lawrence for Rome Odunze’s Chicago Bears as their first-round, 25th overall pick. Noble prefers Lawrence over Miami Hurricanes DE Akheem Mesidor and Auburn Tigers DT Keldric Faulk because of a rare amalgamation of height, length, and athleticism.The UCF alum is a 6-foot-4, 253-pounder. When his physical traits are paired with his speed off the edge, he can be the impactful pass rusher that Chicago has been patiently waiting for. Now that was why he suited the Bears. Now, why does he not suit them?Bleacher Report’s Alex Ballentine reports that Lawrence has incredible athleticism, but he excels standing up.That could become a legitimate concern when his ability to hold up against bigger perimeter tackles in the run game is tested. This should have Chicago looking for someone else.Yes, they need help on the edge. Yes, they were into Maxx Crosby talks. Yes, they ranked in the top 10 from last in the league in sacks [35]. But they had a poor run defense. They ranked 29th in yards allowed per carry and gave up 2,287 yards on the ground. So, this may not be a suitable match.If the Caleb Williams franchise can’t have Malachi Lawrence, then who else could? Brock Purdy-led San Francisco 49ers.The Niners drafted Mykel Williams in 2025 to pair with veteran elite Nick Bosa. But a year later, they are still looking for pass-rushing help. Bosa recorded 17 total tackles, 2.0 sacks, one forced fumble, and one fumble recovery in three games, while Williams recorded 20 total tackles, 1.0 sack, and one fumble recovery in nine games in 2025.No wonder they are looking for a long-term solution. Lawrence recorded 28 total tackles, 7.0 sacks, two pass deflections, and two forced fumbles in 2025. His overall college football stats are 72 total tackles [48 solo], 20.0 sacks, four pass deflections, and three forced fumbles.And so, Bleacher Report’s Brent Sobleski reports that Lawrence has the physical tools and athletic profile to instantly boost the Niners’ defensive front on passing downs.The UCF Knights alum could serve as a designated pass rusher early in his career, where he may not be expected to play every down. He could enter the lineup as part of sub-packages, where Williams would move from his typical outside position to the interior on passing downs, thereby creating a faster, more athletic pass rush.The Niners could bring three of the biggest defensive line investments on the gridiron at the same time.So, would it be the Niners or the Bears who draft Lawrence? Only time will tell… just days left now!
Article Summary: The chicago bears have been asked to steer clear of ucf knights edge malachi lawrence. The san francisco 49ers are projected to select the 6-foot-4, 253-pounder. Lawrence recorded 28 total tackles, 7.0 sacks, two pass deflections, and two forced fumbles.

Article Title: Was Oba Femi the right choice to beat Brock Lesnar in his final match after he teased WWE retirement at WrestleMania 42?
Article Text:
Image via WWE

Was Oba Femi defeating Brock Lesnar the right call after he teased retirement at WrestleMania 42 ?



Who has Oba Femi targeted after WrestleMania 42?

WrestleMania Sunday was opened with a blockbuster collision between Brock Lesnar, with Paul Heyman, and the new rising star of WWE , Oba Femi. The colossal showdown between them saw Femi put down The Beast in shocking fashion and score one of the biggest victories of his career. Following that, Lesnar took off his boots and gloves and left them in the ring. He then shared an emotional moment with Paul Heyman, and seemingly hinted at his in-ring retirement.With Brock Lesnar teasing his retirement from WWE, it would mean that Oba Femi was possibly his last ever opponent, leading to a debate about whether he was the right person to defeat him. In our opinion, WWE took the right decision to book Femi to win at WrestleMania 42 Night 2. He is arguably one of the most dominant WWE superstars today and had one of the most incredible runs in NXT. Moreover, he is very over with the fans when he struts down the ring, which has become his signature.Furthermore, The Ruler was built super strong on the road to WrestleMania 42 by overpowering The Beast at every step of the way. At the same time, his defeat of Lesnar at a grand stage like WrestleMania has given a huge boost to his already thriving run on the main roster, which began over two months ago.So, it can be said that Femi was the right choice to defeat Lesnar in his supposed last match, with The Beast passing the torch to an equally dominant competitor.At the WrestleMania 42 post-show, Oba Femi was asked about his plans after defeating Brock Lesnar. The Ruler made a bold statement by calling out the new World Heavyweight Champion, Roman Reigns, who defeated CM Punk to win the title in the main event. The OTC came on the show later on and said that he would see him throughout the summer to see if he is worthy of competing against him. While it is not confirmed as of now, it will surely be interesting to see Oba square off against Reigns after his exceptional win at WrestleMania 42.Also read: WWE WrestleMania 42: List of winners, top performers, shocking moments, and more
Article Summary: Oba femi defeated brock lesnar at wrestlemania 42 night 2. Lesnar took off his boots and gloves and left them in the ring. He then shared an emotional moment with paul heyman, and seemingly hinted at his in-ring retirement. Femi was the right choice to defeat lesnar in his supposed last match.

Article Title: Mike Vrabel And Dianna Russini: Mike Vrabel’s Coach of the Year win faces scrutiny as AP stays silent on Dianna Russini ballot controversy
Article Text:
Mike Vrabel’s Coach of the Year win faces scrutiny as AP stays silent on Dianna Russini ballot controversy(Getty Images)

Coach of the Year debate intensifies as Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel controversy raises fresh questions

Mike Vrabel’s rise with the New England Patriots should have stayed a football story. Instead, it has turned into a wider debate. Questions around Dianna Russini and her role as an AP voter have now pulled his Coach of the Year honor into the spotlight.The controversy picked up pace in April 2026. And right now, the silence from the Associated Press is only adding more heat.The situation traces back to early April 2026, when photos of Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini surfaced online. The images, first published by the New York Post, showed the two together at a resort in Arizona just before the NFL owners meetings in late March.The fallout came all of a sudden. On top of that, Russini resigned from The Athletic on April 14, 2026, amid an internal review linked to the situation. She addressed it directly in her resignation letter, saying she stood by her work and pushed back on what she called speculation around the photos.That development shifted attention toward her role in AP voting. Russini held a vote for major NFL honors, including Coach of the Year. With Vrabel leading the Patriots to a Super Bowl appearance in his first season, his award looked straightforward on paper. But the timing of the controversy has raised questions about optics and possible conflicts.So far, there is no confirmed evidence of wrongdoing. That part matters. Still, the lack of clarity has kept the story alive. When Pro Football Talk sought a response from the Associated Press in mid-April 2026 regarding a possible review of Russini’s ballots, the organization declined to comment, as reported by Sportskeeda.This is where the debate sharpens. The AP has faced pressure on transparency before. In 2024, voting details became public after backlash from within league circles. Russini herself had spoken about that moment earlier on the “Pardon My Take” podcast, where she admitted the reaction from people in football caught her off guard. She said, “I was out to dinner, and my phone was blowing up with people in football very angry that I voted for people that I voted for. That stunk. I wish I knew that because — it would not have changed my vote — but I love Josh Allen, and I am avoiding him for a really long time.”Meanwhile, Vrabel has continued his role with the Patriots without direct fallout. Reports suggest the franchise has taken a “business as usual” approach despite the noise around Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini's ongoing scandal.That contrast has only fueled the conversation. Dianna Russini steps away. Mike Vrabel stays focused on football. And the AP remains silent. Until that changes, the debate around Mike Vrabel’s award will keep circling.
Article Summary: Mike vrabel’s coach of the year win faces scrutiny as ap stays silent on dianna russini ballot controversy. Questions around russini and her role as an ap voter have now pulled his honor into the spotlight. The ap has faced pressure on transparency before.

Article Title: Tiger Woods son Charlie Woods struggles continue with T42 at Terra Cotta Invitational 2026 as Justin Thomas steps in with support
Article Text:
Charlie Woods (Image Via Getty)

Charlie Woods struggles continue despite late recovery at Terra Cotta Invitational as Justin Thomas offers support

Watch Tiger Woods DUI Bodycam Footage Caught SOS Call To Trump; Shocking Crash & Pills Reveal Chaos Tiger Woods DUI Bodycam Footage Caught SOS Call To Trump; Shocking Crash & Pills Reveal Chaos

The latest outing for Charlie Woods once again showed a mix of hope and struggle. Playing at the Terra Cotta Invitational 2026 at Naples National Golf Club, he finished tied 42nd in a field of 72 players. His total score of 3 over par came from rounds of 79, 71, and 69. On paper, it looks like progress. But when you follow the round closely, it tells a more uneven story.What stands out is how his performance changed day by day. The first round put him on the back foot early, and from there, he kept trying to recover. While the last two rounds showed better control, the slow start cost him a strong finish. This pattern is becoming familiar in his recent tournaments, where a few good moments are not enough to balance the mistakes.The opening round made things tough right away. Starting from the back nine, Charlie Woods dropped three straight bogeys from holes 16 to 18. That early pressure stayed with him. He added more bogeys on holes 2, 5, 6, and 8. There were birdies on 4 and 9, but they could not fully fix the damage. By the end of day one, he was near the bottom of the leaderboard.Then came a better second round. He shot 1 under 71, mixing four bogeys with five birdies.That round helped him move up from 70th to 57th. It showed he could reset and fight back. The final round was even better. After a bogey on the first hole, he settled down and picked up birdies on 6, 7, 9, and 18. That pushed him up 15 spots to finish T42.Still, this is not just about one event. His 2026 season has been difficult overall. At the Junior Invitational, he finished last with rounds of 75, 76, 83, and 80. At the AJGA Simplify Boys Championship, he placed 68th. He did slightly better at the Junior Orange Bowl, finishing 19th, but consistency is still missing.Even with these results, there is support around him. Justin Thomas spoke about him on the Smylie Show. He said, “I wanna be if he wants me to be. I wanna help in any way I can. The shots that he can hit, a lot of guys on Tour can’t hit. He’s very, very impressive and I’m rooting for the best.” Justin Thomas shares a close bond with Tiger Woods, which makes his support feel more personal.Right now, Charlie Woods is still finding his rhythm. The talent is visible, but the results are not steady yet. Until he can put together full rounds without mistakes, these mixed finishes are likely to continue.
Article Summary: Charlie woods finished tied 42nd in the terra cotta invitational 2026 at naples national golf club. His total score of 3 over par came from rounds of 79, 71, and 69. The first round put him on the back foot early, and from there, he kept trying to recover.

Article Title: Connor McDavid’s wife Lauren Kyle celebrates emotional milestone as Oilers captain gears up for electrifying Stanley Cup playoff run
Article Text:
Connor McDavid’s wife (Getty Images)

Connor McDavid’s wife reacts to milestone ahead of Oilers’ high-stakes playoff campaign

The Edmonton Oilers closed their regular season with purpose, delivering a 6-1 win over the Vancouver Canucks that did more than pad the standings. It set a tone. At the center of it, Connor McDavid dictated play with four assists, wrapping up another elite campaign. The result secured second place in the Pacific Division and home-ice advantage for the opening round. Off the ice, the moment carried a personal note as Lauren Kyle shared her pride publicly.Connor McDavid’s final outing wasn’t just productive. It felt controlled, almost routine for a player operating at this level. His four assists helped power an early surge, including a standout opening period where Matt Savoie recorded his first NHL hat trick. The Oilers never looked back from there.After the game, McDavid didn’t overstate it, but he made it clear the win mattered beyond the scoreboard. “It was an important one. We wanted to start here at home and give ourselves the best chance in the first round. The start was great,” he said.That clarity extended to his line’s development. There has been a noticeable shift in chemistry, especially with Savoie and Zach Hyman alongside him. “(Me and Savoie are) building something a little bit, playing together for a little while now.We’re starting to understand each other a little bit. (Zach Hyman) came in and did exactly what he does, forechecks hard and fills that net-front spot, which frees up a lot of space for us. ”Numbers back up the impact. McDavid secured the Art Ross Trophy with 138 points, his sixth time leading the league. That places him alongside Mario Lemieux and Gordie Howe, trailing only Wayne Gretzky in all-time scoring titles. It’s rare company, and it adds weight to what already feels like a defining stretch in his career.Away from the numbers, Lauren Kyle’s posts from Rogers Place gave a glimpse into the moment. A shot of the scoreboard came with a simple line, “Off to the playoffs!!” Another message, just as direct, read, “So proud of you.” It wasn’t elaborate, but it didn’t need to be. The context spoke for itself.Edmonton’s wider performance also offered encouragement. Ryan Nugent-Hopkins contributed offensively, while Colton Dach added a Gordie Howe hat trick. Cleaner puck movement and sharper finishing stood out, areas that had wavered at times earlier in the schedule.The focus now shifts quickly. A first-round matchup with the Anaheim Ducks begins April 20. McDavid’s form is a given at this point. The question is whether the rhythm building around him holds under playoff pressure.
Article Summary: Edmonton oilers beat vancouver canucks 6-1 to clinch second place in the pacific division. Connor mcdavid had four assists in the win, his sixth art ross trophy. His wife, lauren kyle, posted a message to her husband from rogers place.

Article Title: Aryna Sabalenka fiancé Georgios Frangulis addresses critics questioning his presence during her tennis matches
Article Text:
Aryna Sabalenka and Georgios Frangulis (Image Via Getty)

Money Buys Happiness podcast



Aryna Sabalenka and Georgios Frangulis relationship and response to criticism explained

Esquire

There has been a lot of talk around Aryna Sabalenka and her fiancé Georgios Frangulis. Many fans have noticed him sitting in the stands during her matches, and not everyone has been supportive. Some people even questioned how he manages his business while attending so many games. Now, Georgios has finally responded, and his message was very direct.In a video shared by theon Instagram, Georgios made it clear that he is not bothered by the criticism. He spoke openly about his relationship and how they support each other. At the same time, he also pushed back at people who keep judging his choices and his presence during Sabalenka’s matches.Aryna Sabalenka and Georgios Frangulis started dating in 2024, and earlier this year, they announced their engagement. Since then, Georgios has often been seen in her player box during big matches. While many fans enjoy seeing that support, others have raised questions about his work and time.Georgios Frangulis addressed this directly in his statement. He said, “For me to have someone that I love that trusts me and looks up to me.I can teach and learn from, with my fiancé. With Aryna it’s all upside. I don’t see any downside.”He then spoke about the criticism he receives and how he handles his work. He explained that watching matches does not stop him from managing his responsibilities. He said, “Believe me I get criticism. How can he run the company. He’s always watching tennis. You see me on TV and I am watching tennis. It’s a two-hour match. Like I was doing a meeting before I’m gonna do another after. Not your business what I am doing.”Georgios Frangulis also praised Aryna Sabalenka’s success and their shared understanding. He added, “She’s super accomplished. We can enjoy each other’s success, help each other’s failures.”On the other side, Sabalenka has also spoken about how important this relationship is for her. In an interview with, she shared a simple lesson she has learned. She said, “You see that each area of life takes the same dedication, discipline, and hard work.”While all this is happening off the court, Sabalenka’s form on the court has been strong. She started the season by winning the Brisbane International and then reached the final of the Australian Open. She later completed the Sunshine Double by winning both Indian Wells and the Miami Open, beating top players like Elena Rybakina and Coco Gauff.She was set to play at the Stuttgart Open but pulled out due to an injury picked up in Miami. Even so, both her performance and her personal life continue to stay in the spotlight.
Article Summary: Aryna sabalenka and georgios frangulis started dating in 2024. Georgios has often been seen in her player box during big matches. While many fans enjoy seeing that support, others have raised questions about his work and time.

Article Title: Jim Rutherford sparks NHL trade rumors over Quinn Hughes' Vancouver Canucks exit raising Minnesota Wild absence concerns
Article Text:
Quinn Hughes, who recently joined the Minnesota Wild, was absent from multiple practice sessions due to his illness( Image via Imagn Images)

Jim Rutherford explains Quinn Hughes of the Vancouver Canucks NHL trade rumors

Jim Rutherford's comments about Quinn Hughes' departure have put the Vancouver Canucks back in the news, sparking a lot of NHL trade rumors. His comments made it seem like the star defenseman's departure was planned, which took the focus off the team's performance and put it on the player's intentions.Hughes not being with the Minnesota Wild before Game 1 has also made things more uncertain. When you add in the earlier rumors about the New Jersey Devils making a trade, this situation has quickly become a big story in the NHL. Jim Rutherford explains Quinn Hughes’ Vancouver Canucks exit by stating the player had already decided to leave. The Vancouver Canucks executive emphasized that Hughes’ move was not entirely tied to team struggles but rather a personal decision to eventually return to the United States.This point of view has sparked NHL trade rumors because it changes the way people talk about player movement and free agency. Rutherford said that this was like other NHL situations where players picked their favorite teams, no matter how competitive they were.These comments are important because they come at a time when the Canucks are still dealing with changes in their organization. It also makes us think about how teams keep their best players in a league where players are moving around more and more.Quinn Hughes' current situation with the Minnesota Wild has made the talks even more heated. The defenseman missed practice before Game 1, and reports say that illness was the main reason.Adding to the mystery, earlier NHL trade rumors linked Hughes to the New Jersey Devils, where there was a lot of talk about him getting back together with his brothers.Hughes' availability could have a big impact on how the Minnesota Wild set up their defense, at least from the point of view of an NHL match preview.Rutherford's comments may have made one part of Hughes' leaving clearer. But they have also led to more talk about how players can make their own choices and how teams should plan their strategies in the modern NHL, leaving front offices facing tougher challenges in retaining stars amid evolving player priorities.
Article Summary: Jim rutherford's comments about quinn hughes' departure have put the vancouver canucks back in the news. His comments made it seem like the star defenseman's departure was planned, which took the focus off the team's performance and put it on the player's intentions.

Article Title: Toronto Maple Leafs forward Matthew Knies emerges as Chicago Blackhawks target in latest NHL trade rumors
Article Text:
Matthew Knies' trade rumors begin to grow amidst disappointing 2025-26 campaign (Image via Getty Images)

Watch Matthew Knies | End of Season Media Availability | April 16, 2026 Matthew Knies | End of Season Media Availability | April 16, 2026

Matthew Knies of Toronto Maple Leafs linked to Chicago Blackhawks trade scenario

Matthew Knies, a forward for the Toronto Maple Leafs, is once again at the center of NHL trade rumors. Several teams are interested in him. Recent reports say that the Chicago Blackhawks might be an unexpected team interested in signing him, even though they are in the middle of rebuilding.Toronto hasn't made any official moves yet, but the buzz around Knies suggests that he is seen as a valuable young player throughout the league. As teams figure out their offseason priorities and roster needs, things are changing quickly.People are saying that the Chicago Blackhawks might trade for Matthew Knies to make their forward lineup stronger. Sources close to the NHL say that Chicago is looking into ways to add a tough, goal-scoring winger who can help their young core.The Blackhawks are interested in this because they need to build around young players like Connor Bedard. Adding someone like Knies could have an immediate effect and be useful in the long run. Even though Chicago is rebuilding, they have looked into adding established young players in the past instead of just relying on draft picks.From Toronto's point of view, it wouldn't be easy to move Knies. The 23-year-old has made a lot of progress and is seen as a key part of the team's future.If the Maple Leafs do want to change their roster, they might want to look at offers that include high draft picks or top prospects.The most important question is still what kind of return Toronto would want. The asking price could be high because Knies is young, strong, and has a lot of potential to score. On the other hand, Chicago needs to decide if it's worth giving up valuable things to speed up the rebuilding process.This possible situation is part of a bigger trend in the NHL: teams trying to plan for the future while still being competitive right now. In the next NHL updates, pay attention to the link between Toronto and Chicago, whether or not a deal goes through, as trade talks intensify and franchises weigh short-term gains against long-term rebuilding goals.
Article Summary: Matthew knies, a forward for the toronto maple leafs, is once again at the center of nhl trade rumors. Chicago blackhawks might be an unexpected team interested in signing him, even though they are in the middle of rebuilding. The 23-year-old has made a lot of progress and is seen as a key part of the team's future.

Article Title: “Three-against-one situation”: El Rubius opens up on being “targeted” in MrBeast’s viral $1M challenge
Article Text:
El Rubius reacted honestly after his elimination from MrBeast’s $1 million challenge, calling it “unfair” and claiming he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings. His response felt real and balanced, especially after MrBeast’s team later sent him a cake, softening the moment.

El Rubius reflects on a tough and “unfair” exit







El Rubius did not just walk away from MrBeast’s $1 million streamer challenge. He opened up. Soon after his elimination, the Spanish creator shared a raw reaction with fans, giving them a closer look at what the experience felt like from inside the game. It was not polished or carefully framed. It felt real, and that is exactly why it caught attention so quickly.The clip and his response have since fueled conversations across the streaming space. Some viewers believe intense competitions like this naturally lead to uneven situations. Others feel Rubius may have had a point about being singled out. Either way, his words have added a human layer to a challenge that many only saw as entertainment.Speaking through an Instagram Story, Rubius did not hide his frustration, but he also made sure to thank his supporters. He said, "Guys, I just got knocked out of the game. It was a bit of an unfair elimination, but hey, at least I managed to walk away with $50,000 for you all, which I’ve already distributed. It went to the mods, the subs, and the non-subs alike."He further added, "I’m happy, of course, though admittedly, it was incredibly tough.I wasn't really a fan of the challenge itself, either. But then again... it was basically a three-against-one situation the entire time. I mean, they were targeting me specifically the whole way through. I kept trying to go after RaKai, but, well, he actually just got eliminated in the end. So, at least justice was served for Abraham. Abraham, if you’re watching this, we were all rooting for you, and standing right there with you."His message carried mixed emotions. There was disappointment, yes, but also pride in how he handled things. Giving away his $50,000 winnings to his community stood out as a gesture that meant more than the result itself.He continued with another honest note, saying, "And in the end, karma finally caught up with that little punk. Sorry, I’m being a bit toxic right now, but let's just hope the MrBeast team doesn't see this! Guys, thank you all so much. Seriously, thank you for all the support and for just being there."He added, "Every time I asked for something in the chat or whatever it was, you guys were right there. You’re incredible. I’m a little disappointed in myself, personally, mostly for not performing better, but hey, I gave it my all, and we still walked away with $50,000, so we’ve got to look on the bright side. All right, guys, big hugs to all my brothers out there!"Interestingly, the story did not end with frustration. Later that day, Rubius revealed that MrBeast’s team had sent him a cake after his exit. It was a small gesture, but it shifted the mood. It showed that even in a high-pressure challenge, there is still room for respect.In the end, Rubius’ reaction felt honest and grounded. That is what stayed with people.
Article Summary: El rubius was eliminated from mrbeast's $1 million challenge. He called it "unfair" and said he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings.
